auth.desc: Sign in to access your dashboard

nav.cluster_info_desc: Real-time specifications of available processing nodes connected to the competition queue.
nav.no_nodes_connected: No active processing nodes currently connected.
nav.failed_fetch_docs_network: Failed to fetch documentation due to a network error.

api.ERR_ACCESS_DENIED: Access denied. You do not have the required permissions.
api.ERR_ADMIN_CLI_ONLY: Administrator accounts can only be generated directly on the server command line (CLI).
api.ERR_AST_RULE_FAILED: AST and general execution rule validation failed.
api.ERR_CANNOT_ASSIGN_STARTED: Cannot assign user to a competition that has already started.
api.ERR_CANNOT_CHANGE_ROLE_ADMIN: Cannot change user role to Administrator.
api.ERR_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own admin account.
api.ERR_CANNOT_EDIT_STARTED: Cannot edit user: The assigned competition has already started.
api.ERR_CANNOT_MOVE_ENDED: Cannot move task -- source stage has ended
api.ERR_CANNOT_MOVE_FINALIZED: Cannot move task -- source stage is finalized
api.ERR_CANNOT_MOVE_HAS_MANUAL_POINTS: Cannot move task -- submissions have manual points assigned
api.ERR_CANNOT_RESET_BULK_STARTED: Cannot reset passwords: The competition has already started.
api.ERR_CANNOT_RESET_STARTED: Cannot reset password: The assigned competition has already started.
api.ERR_CHALLENGE_ARCHIVED: This challenge has been archived and no longer accepts submissions.
api.ERR_CHALLENGE_ID_REQUIRED: challenge_id is required for competitor registration.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_ARCHIVED: This competition has been archived. Registered competitors are not allowed to log in.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_ENDED: This competition has ended and no longer accepts submissions.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_FINALIZED: Submissions are disabled for finalized competitions.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_FROZEN: This competition is currently frozen. Submissions are temporarily blocked.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_NOT_ENDED: The competition has not ended yet.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_NOT_FINISHED: Submissions cannot be downloaded until the competition has finished.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_NOT_STARTED: This competition has not started yet.
api.ERR_COMPETITION_STARTED: Cannot create a test stage after the competition has started.
api.ERR_COMPETITOR_ALREADY_REGISTERED: A competitor with these demographic details is already registered for this competition.
api.ERR_DATETIME_REQUIRED: Competition start time and end time are required.
api.ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND: File not found in task metadata.
api.ERR_TASK_FILE_TOO_LARGE: File exceeds the maximum allowed size of 500MB.
api.ERR_TOTAL_SIZE_EXCEEDED: Total file size exceeds the 2 GB limit for a single task.
api.ERR_FORBIDDEN: Only administrators are allowed to configure custom environments.
api.ERR_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
api.ERR_INVALID_DATE_RANGE: End time must be after start time.
api.ERR_INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Only Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb) files are supported.
api.ERR_INVALID_IMPORT_DATA: Import data must be a JSON object.
api.ERR_INVALID_PRIVATE_SCORE: private_score must be numeric or null
api.ERR_INVALID_PUBLIC_SCORE: public_score must be numeric or null
api.ERR_INVALID_SELECTED_CELLS: Each selected cell must be an object with id, type, and source.
api.ERR_INVALID_TASK_ID: Invalid task ID for this challenge.
api.ERR_INVALID_UPLOAD_FORMAT: Only ZIP files uploaded as multipart/form-data are supported.
api.ERR_JURY_CANNOT_EDIT_ADMIN: Jury members cannot edit administrator or other jury accounts.
api.ERR_JURY_ONLY_COMPETITOR: Jury members can only register competitor accounts.
api.ERR_JURY_REGISTRATION_STARTED: Jury members cannot register competitors once the competition has started.
api.ERR_MISSING_DEMOGRAPHICS: Name, Surname, Middle Name, Birth Date, Grade, School and City are required.
api.ERR_MISSING_MANUAL_POINTS: Cannot finalize. A competitor is missing manual points for a task.
api.ERR_NOT_AVAILABLE: Access denied or task not available yet.
api.ERR_NOT_FINALIZED: Stage must be finalized before toggling reveal.
api.ERR_NOT_REGISTERED: You are not registered for this competition.
api.ERR_NO_COMPETITORS: Cannot finalize a stage or competition with no competitors.
api.ERR_NO_COMPLETED_SUBMISSIONS: No completed submissions found for this user/task.
api.ERR_NO_SUBMISSIONS: Only competitors with submissions can be assigned manual points.
api.ERR_QUEUE_UNAVAILABLE: Submission queue is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
api.ERR_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
api.ERR_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in a minute.
api.ERR_SCORES_NOT_FINALIZED: Scores must be finalized before downloading.
api.ERR_SELECTION_WINDOW_CLOSED: The final selection window for this stage has closed.
api.ERR_STAGE_DEADLINE_PASSED: The deadline for this stage has passed.
api.ERR_STAGE_MISMATCH: Stage does not belong to this challenge.
api.ERR_STAGE_NOT_ENDED: The stage has not ended yet.
api.ERR_STAGE_NOT_FINISHED: Submissions cannot be downloaded until this stage has finished.
api.ERR_STAGE_NOT_STARTED: The stage has not started yet.
api.ERR_STAGE_OUT_OF_COMPETITION_BOUNDS: Stage timeline must be within competition bounds.
api.ERR_STAGE_REQUIRED: Task must be assigned to a stage when the competition has stages.
api.ERR_SUBMISSION_LATE: Cannot select a submission created after the stage deadline.
api.ERR_SUBMIT_LOCKED: Another submission is being processed. Please wait.
api.ERR_TASK_NOT_IN_CHALLENGE: Task does not belong to this challenge.
api.ERR_TEST_STAGE_AFTER_COMP_START: Test stage must end before the competition starts.
api.ERR_TEST_STAGE_EXISTS: A test stage already exists for this competition.
api.ERR_TOKEN_INVALID: Unauthorized access. Token is missing, expired, or invalid.
api.ERR_TOO_MANY_FILES: You can upload a maximum of 5 files per task.
api.ERR_TASK_BUILD_ERROR: This task is temporarily unavailable due to an environment configuration issue.
api.ERR_USERNAME_TAKEN: User with this username already exists.
api.ERR_SUBMISSION_NOT_KILLABLE: Submission is not in a killable state. Only queued or running submissions can be killed.
api.ERR_SUBMISSION_KILL_DENIED: You do not have permission to kill this submission.

submissions.none_found: No submissions found for this task.
submissions.select_to_view: Select a submission to view details.
submissions.selected_final_help: This is your selected final submission for this task.
submissions.select_final_label: Select as final submission (enforces anti-overfitting rules).
submissions.cannot_select_late: Cannot select a submission created after the stage deadline.
submissions.cannot_select_closed: The final selection window for this stage has closed.
submissions.name: Name:
submissions.no_task_selected: Please select a task to view submissions.
submissions.waiting_for_evaluation: Waiting for running pre-deadline submissions to complete evaluation...
submissions.kill_confirm: Are you sure you want to kill this submission? It will be marked as failed.
submissions.search_competitor_placeholder: Search by alias, name, or school...

challenge.judge_session_desc: Submission is restricted to registered competitors. Use the Admin Panel to register competitors and manage tasks.
challenge.stage_deadline_passed: The deadline for stage "{{title}}" has passed.
challenge.competition_finalized_desc: This competition has been finalized. Submissions are disabled.
challenge.competition_closed_desc: This competition is no longer accepting submissions.
challenge.parsed_cells_auto_selected: Parsed {{total}} cells. Auto-selected {{selected}} cell(s) with "# SUBMIT".
challenge.select_cells_to_submit: Select at least one cell to submit.
challenge.jury_custom_evaluator_desc: This task uses a custom evaluator. Please ensure your submission defines the entry-point function signatures specified in the task description or the downloadable Baseline Notebook.
challenge.no_task_selected: No task selected. Select a task from the sidebar to view details and submit.
challenge.no_competition_selected: No competition selected or active. Please contact a jury or administrator.

common.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
common.footer: © 2026 LavBench · All submissions run in isolated GPU sandboxes

leaderboard.no_submissions: No scored submissions yet. Be the first!
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.normalized_hint: Raw metric was inverted (lower-is-better → higher-is-better). Score = 1/(1 + raw_value).
leaderboard.finalize_disabled_tooltip: All stages must be finalized first
leaderboard.finalize_modal_desc: You are finalizing scores for "{{title}}". This action will reveal competitor identities and enable manual points grading.
leaderboard.finalize_visibility_desc: Select which details should be visible to competitors on the leaderboard:
leaderboard.reveal_public_scores_help: Allow competitors to see evaluation public scores.
leaderboard.reveal_private_scores_help: Allow competitors to see evaluation private scores inside details.
leaderboard.reveal_points_help: Allow competitors to see manually entered points and total points. If disabled along with scores, only the final ranking will be visible.
leaderboard.save_points_error: Points must be an integer between 0 and 100
leaderboard.stage_finalized_internal_notice: This stage is finalized internally. Results are not public.
leaderboard.reason_required_error: Changelog note is required when editing scores.
leaderboard.reason_required_placeholder: Describe why you are modifying points...

admin.no_audit_logs: No audit logs found matching criteria.
admin.reveal_results_label: Reveal private scores and competitor identities immediately

workers.monitoring_desc: Real-time monitoring of host resources and connected Celery evaluation workers. (Auto-refreshes every 5s)
workers.no_workers: No Celery workers connected. Evaluation queue is paused.
workers.internal_only_notice: Internal/System tasks only. Submission queues are disabled.
workers.no_active_workers_connected: No active workers connected. Check Celery broker / configuration.

submission_queue.title: Submission Queue
submission_queue.clear_queue_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the entire submission queue? All queued and running submissions will be killed.
submission_queue.kill_confirm: Are you sure you want to kill this queued submission?

stages.reveal_results_label: Reveal private scores and points to competitors
stages.reveal_results_and_points_desc: Reveal results and points to competitors (otherwise finalization is jury-internal only)

competitor_reg.competition_started_warning: This competition has started. Jury members cannot modify competitors.
competitor_reg.manual_registration_desc: Generates secure, randomized login credentials and assigned alias ID.
competitor_reg.share_credentials_help: Please copy these credentials and share them with the competitor securely.
competitor_reg.csv_import_desc: Bulk upload competitors using a CSV file. Required columns: `name`, `surname`, `middle_name`, `birth_date` (format: YYYY-MM-DD), `grade`, `school`, `city`. Optional: `email`, `anonymous` (0 or 1).
competitor_reg.bulk_import_started_warning: This competition has started. Jury members cannot import competitors.
competitor_reg.unmasking_desc: Pseudonym aliases mapped to real user details for unmasking checks.
competitor_reg.no_competitors_found: No competitors found matching your search.
competitor_reg.download_credentials_help: Competitor accounts successfully created. Click below to download their login credentials securely.
competitor_reg.download_reset_credentials_help: Passwords reset successfully. Click below to download their updated credentials securely.

user_mgmt.register_user_account_desc: Manually register a Jury/Judge or Competitor account.
user_mgmt.no_users_found: No users found matching your search.
user_mgmt.edit_user_account_desc: Modify user role, details, and competition access permissions.
user_mgmt.password_optional_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password

tasks.ban_magic_commands: Ban Jupyter magic command symbols (!) or (%) (Score 0 if found)
tasks.banned_libraries: Banned Libraries list (comma-separated, checked via AST imports)
tasks.hf_dataset_metrics: E. Hugging Face Dataset & Metrics config
tasks.resource_files_title: H. Resource Files (Up to 5 files, Max 25MB each)
tasks.press_cmd_ctrl: Press Cmd/Ctrl to choose multiple files.
tasks.ban_magic_desc: Disallows Jupyter magic commands like `!wget` or `%pip` in submissions.
tasks.max_files_reached: Maximum of {{count}} files reached. Remove some to add new ones.
tasks.labels_parquet_required: labels.parquet is required for task evaluation. Please upload it in the Files tab.
tasks.files_and_baseline_desc: Upload the baseline Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb) and all ground-truth/resource files (labels.parquet, CSV, PY, TXT).
tasks.baseline_required_help: Please upload a Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb) to use as the task baseline.
tasks.resources_required_help: Please upload task resource files. Remember that labels.parquet is required.
tasks.docker_sandbox_desc: Configure the isolated environment where competitor code executes. The system automatically caches container images to optimize consecutive runs.
tasks.hf_integrations_desc: Preload Hugging Face models and datasets into the sandbox container. The system downloads them at task-save time and mounts them into the offline sandbox at /hf_cache.
tasks.ground_truth_desc: Upload `labels.parquet` here for the unified evaluation engine. You can also attach any dataset CSVs or additional scripts.
tasks.files_uploaded_upon_save: Selected files will be uploaded upon save.
tasks.baseline_replaced_desc: Selecting a new file will replace the current baseline.
tasks.custom_evaluator_desc: Upload a Python script that defines how to evaluate submissions. The script must declare `METRIC_NAME`, `SUBMISSION_COLUMNS`, `LABELS_COLUMNS` and provide an `evaluate(df_sub, df_labels, options=None)` function returning a dict of metric values.
tasks.baseline_code_desc: Upload a Jupyter Notebook (`.ipynb`) containing starter code or a baseline solution for competitors.
tasks.column_definitions_desc: Define the expected columns for both submission.parquet and labels.parquet. The same column names are used in both files.
tasks.no_columns_defined: No columns defined. Add columns to describe the expected parquet structure.
tasks.parquet_preview_desc: Expected file structure based on your column definitions and metric mappings.
tasks.evaluator_err_metric_not_in_return: METRIC_NAME "{{name}}" not found in evaluate() return keys: {{keys}}

notifications.select_competition_competitor_role: Select a target competition for competitor role.
notifications.no_eligible_competitions: No eligible competitions available to reset passwords.
notifications.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address

confirm.delete_competition_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete competition "{{title}}"? This deletes all associated tasks, submissions and pseudonyms.
confirm.finalize_scores_message: Finalize scores? This reveals private scores and real names on the leaderboard.
confirm.create_test_stage_message: Create a test stage for competitors to test the environment? You will be prompted for the time range.
confirm.delete_stage_message: Are you sure you want to delete stage "{{title}}"? All tasks under this stage will be unassigned.
confirm.delete_task_message: Are you sure you want to delete task "{{title}}"? This will delete all competitor submissions for this task.
confirm.delete_user_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete user account "{{username}}"? All their submissions will be deleted.
confirm.reset_password_message: Are you sure you want to generate a new random password for competitor "{{displayName}}"?
confirm.bulk_reset_message:
Enter the Competition ID for which you want to reset ALL competitor passwords:

{{optionsStr}}
confirm.confirm_bulk_reset_message: WARNING: This will generate new random passwords for ALL competitors in "{{title}}". The old passwords will stop working immediately. Proceed?
